lines.hearsay: Two voices at {place} kept the road going long after the plates were cleared.
lines.gossip: {A} told {B} about the pass road at {place} until the lamps went down, and {B} never touched supper — {A} always sleeps easier for having told it, and {B} never does, and neither of them has worked that out yet.
lines.report: {A} recounted expedition particulars to {B} at {place}, slot {slot}.
